name: Deepin
tagline: The most beautiful Linux desktop, built from the ground up
description: Deepin is a Debian-based distribution developed by Wuhan Deepin Technology in China, famous for its visually stunning Deepin Desktop Environment (DDE). DDE features smooth animations, a macOS-inspired dock, a unique control centre panel, and a suite of custom apps (music player, movie player, file manager, app store) with a design quality rarely seen in Linux. Deepin has attracted millions of users who prioritise aesthetics and ease of use. The trade-off is that DDE is resource-heavier than most desktop environments and the privacy posture of a Chinese-developed OS warrants consideration.
